# External model area

This directory is intentionally excluded from Git except for this README, `.gitkeep`, and `source_manifest.csv`.

Place manually downloaded or cloned third-party model sources here for local audit only. Do not commit PSCAD project files, PSCAD official examples, E-TRAN libraries, license files, generated EMTDC binaries, or compiler artifacts unless redistribution permission has been explicitly confirmed.

Current local audit target:

- `pnnl-enhanced-ieee39`: cloned from `https://github.com/pnnltestsystem/Enhanced-IEEE-39-Bus-System-with-Inverter-based-Resources-on-Multi-Time-Scale-Platforms.git`
